records.name: Transit Blackout
records.summary: A whole transit line goes dark just long enough for someone important to vanish.

records.name: Labor Flash Riot
records.summary: A labor protest pivots from speeches to shields when drone cops overreact.

records.name: Clinic Fire Sale
records.summary: A black clinic dumps inventory after a tip that regulators are coming.

records.name: Braindance Leak
records.summary: A leaked memory clip rewrites the public story around a recent killing.

records.name: Acid Rain Alert
records.summary: Weather sirens push crowds indoors while the real operators move through maintenance channels.

records.name: Executive Memorial
records.summary: A memorial event doubles as a quiet power struggle over succession and secrets.

records.name: Auction of Last Resort
records.summary: Desperate families, gangs, and corps all bid on the same life-saving prototype.

records.name: Mesh Collapse
records.summary: A neighborhood's community network fails under pressure, isolating allies and exposing refugees.
